name: Multiple Failed Admin Logins
description: More than 5 failed authentication attempts for admin-level accounts within 15 minutes
recommendedSteps: Verify if the user account is a privileged/admin account
Check source IP against known assets
Review if account was subsequently locked out (Event 4740)
Check for successful login after failures (potential compromise)
Contact user to verify login attempts

name: Potential Lateral Movement
description: Authentication from unusual source followed by remote service access to different target
recommendedSteps: Identify the source workstation and verify with user
Check if target systems are expected for this user's role
Review Defender for Endpoint alerts on both source and target
Check for data exfiltration indicators
Consider isolating the source device pending investigation

name: Tunnel Instability
description: More than 10 tunnel flaps in 1 hour on any IPsec tunnel
recommendedSteps: Check ISP status for affected WAN links
Review FortiGate system resources (CPU, memory)
Check for MTU/fragmentation issues
Verify DPD settings and interval
Check if flaps correlate with time-of-day pattern (ISP maintenance)

name: Backup Job Failure
description: Veeam backup job failure with associated infrastructure events
recommendedSteps: Check Veeam console for detailed job status
Verify VM/host accessibility
Check storage space on backup repository
Review VSS writer status on source VM
Check network connectivity to backup target

name: Critical Certificate Expiring
description: Certificate on a critical asset expiring within 30 days
recommendedSteps: Identify the certificate and its purpose
Plan certificate renewal
Verify auto-enrollment is configured if applicable
Test renewal in non-production first
Schedule maintenance window for certificate replacement

name: BGP Route Anomaly
description: Unexpected BGP neighbor state change or route withdrawal
recommendedSteps: Verify tunnel status to the affected neighbor
Check if HA failover occurred simultaneously
Verify BGP configuration on both peers
Check for route flapping patterns
Review ISP/WAN link status

name: NPS Service Degradation
description: Elevated NPS authentication failures indicating potential service issues
recommendedSteps: Check NPS server health and service status
Review top rejection reason codes
Verify AD connectivity from NPS server
Check certificate validity on NPS server
Verify RADIUS shared secrets with NAS devices

name: Defender Critical Alert
description: Critical severity Defender for Endpoint alert
recommendedSteps: Review alert details in Microsoft 365 Security Center
Check device isolation status
Review user's recent activity
Check for lateral movement indicators
Initiate incident response procedure if confirmed

name: Configuration Change Outside Maintenance Window
description: FortiManager policy push outside defined maintenance windows
recommendedSteps: Verify if change was authorized
Check change management records
Review what was changed
Verify change didn't cause service disruption
Document as exception if authorized emergency change

name: Multiple AV Detections
description: Multiple antivirus or malware detections across different endpoints within 1 hour
recommendedSteps: Identify the malware/threat name across detections
Determine if same threat on multiple devices (outbreak) or different threats
Check email gateway logs for potential phishing campaign
Review web filter logs for malicious downloads
Consider network isolation if outbreak confirmed
